name: ArvanCloud
description: ArvanCloud — Iranian CDN and cloud provider offering object storage, DDoS protection, and serverless edge compute.

seo.title: ArvanCloud — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: ArvanCloud: ArvanCloud — Iranian CDN and cloud provider offering object storage, DDoS protection, and serverless edge compute.

when_to_use: CDN and DDoS protection for Iran-regional web applications
Object storage with S3-compatible API in Iran's cloud zone
Edge compute for low-latency apps serving MENA audiences
Live video streaming with ArvanCloud CDN edge nodes
Local cloud alternative compliant with Iranian data regulations

pros: Integrated CDN, DDoS, and object storage
Serverless edge compute with JS runtime
cons: Sanctions limit usage outside Iran region
Smaller global POP footprint than Tier-1 CDNs
review.verdict: Essential infrastructure for serving Iranian audiences, not viable as primary global CDN provider.
review.best_for: Businesses targeting Iranian users needing local CDN and cloud services
review.not_for: Global SaaS products or companies under US export compliance constraints
